title: GTID-Based Binlog Recovery Flow
interaction_flow: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: register event handlers (STOP, HEARTBEAT, ROTATE, TABLE_MAP, QUERY, GTID, DML, XID)
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: register handleGtidEvent handler for GTID EventType
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: gtidSet() → String offsetGtids (restartGtidSet from stored offset)
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogConnectorConnection: filterGtidSet(gtidSourceFilter, offsetGtids, availableServerGtidSet, purgedServerGtidSet) → GtidSet filteredGtidSet
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: setCompletedGtidSet(filteredGtidSetStr) [sets both currentGtidSet and restartGtidSet]
alt filteredGtidSet == null && purgedServerGtidSet is empty (no prior GTIDs)
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: initializeGtidSet("") [start from empty, purged used only for client]
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: initializeGtidSet("") [reset client GTID state]
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: resetGtidSet() [clears currentGtidSet and restartGtidSet]
BinaryLogClient → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: [fires events via registered EventListeners]
BinaryLogClient → BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: handleGtidEvent(partition, offsetContext, event, gtidDmlSourceFilter) [abstract]
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: startGtid(gtid, gtidSet) [updates currentGtidSet; restartGtidSet = prev currentGtidSet]
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: startNextTransaction() [saves binlogFilename+position as restart point, sets transactionId via GTID or file+pos]
BinlogOffsetContext → BinlogOffsetContext: commitTransaction() [restartGtidSet = currentGtidSet, updates restartBinlogPosition]
BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource → BinlogOffsetContext: getOffset() → offsetUsingPosition() [serializes restartGtidSet under key 'gtids' + binlog filename/position]

BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource: execute(ChangeEventSourceContext, P partition, O offsetContext) throws InterruptedException
BinlogOffsetContext: startGtid(String gtid, String gtidSet) [restartGtidSet = prev currentGtidSet; currentGtidSet = trimmed new set]
BinlogConnectorConnection: filterGtidSet(Predicate<String>, String offsetGtids, GtidSet available, GtidSet purged) [abstract] → GtidSet

key_relationships: BinlogStreamingChangeEventSource depends_on BinaryLogClient (sets GTID set / binlog position)
handleGtidEvent() and initializeGtidSet() are abstract — overridden by MySQL/MariaDB subclasses

gtid_offset_keys.GTID_SET_KEY: 'gtids' — stored in offset map as restartGtidSet
gtid_offset_keys.EVENTS_TO_SKIP_OFFSET_KEY: 'event' — count of events to skip after restart

config_fields.GTID_SOURCE_INCLUDES: gtid.source.includes — LIST, include GTID source filter
config_fields.GTID_SOURCE_EXCLUDES: gtid.source.excludes — STRING, exclude GTID source filter (mutually exclusive with includes)
config_fields.GTID_SOURCE_FILTER_DML_EVENTS: gtid.source.filter.dml.events — BOOLEAN default true, filter DML events by GTID source
config_fields.IGNORE_GTID_ON_RECOVERY: gtid.ignore.on.recovery — BOOLEAN default false, use binlog position instead of GTID on recovery

decision_logic.filtered_gtid_set_non_null: prior GTIDs exist in offset → client.setGtidSet(filtered); offsetContext.setCompletedGtidSet(filtered)
decision_logic.filtered_gtid_set_null_no_purge: no prior GTIDs, no purged → client.setGtidSet(''); initializeGtidSet('')
decision_logic.filtered_gtid_set_null_with_purge: no prior GTIDs, purged exist → client.setGtidSet(purged); initializeGtidSet('')
decision_logic.binlog_position_fallback: not GTID mode OR shouldIgnoreGtidOnRecovery → setBinlogFilename/Position; optionally resetGtidSet

important_notes: handleGtidEvent() and initializeGtidSet() are abstract — MySQL connector uses GtidEventData; MariaDB uses AnnotateRowsEventData-style GTID. BinlogOffsetContext maintains TWO GTID sets: restartGtidSet (safe pre-transaction) and currentGtidSet (includes ongoing tx). On restart with GTID offset, filterGtidSet merges server-known, purged, and last-checkpoint sets. IGNORE_GTID_ON_RECOVERY allows server-side GTID mode to remain enabled while the connector uses binlog file+position for recovery.
